steps.title: Use the intercept shortcut
steps.content: The initial deposit is the amount in the account at the start. Since $x$ measures months since the initial deposit, the starting point is $x=0$.

steps.title: Read the starting balance
steps.content: At $x=0$, the graph crosses the $y$-axis at $20$. The $y$-axis is in dollars, so the starting account balance was 20 dollars.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The estimated initial deposit is $f(0)=20$, so the answer is 20.
